subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy letter hath been presented before the Throne, and We have hearkened unto thy call therein, and beheld the fire of thy love for God, thy Lord and the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی قد حضر کتابک لدی العرش و سمعنا منه ندآئک و راینا نار حبک لله ربک و رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @love of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
